title: Quacky's Better Keybinds
description: Want to double bind without trouble? Want to just have several keys mapped to 1 slot since why not? Heres the mod for you! Maybe banned from pvp servers.
body:
# Quacky's Better Keybinds

> Rebind any action to anything — multiple keys, mouse buttons, and combos.
> **Client-side only.** Works on Lunar, Modrinth App, Feather, and vanilla Fabric.

---

## Features

- **Bind anything** — every action in the Controls menu, vanilla *and* modded, is bindable.
- **Multiple binds per action** — give one action as many key combos as you want.
- **Combos** — chain keys and mouse buttons together (`Shift + Left Click`, `Ctrl + Alt + P`).
- **Order-sensitive option** — per bind, require the exact press order, or allow any order.
- **Smart conflict resolution** — the most specific combo always wins.
- **Multi-key capture** — press your whole combo; it auto-finalizes after 3 seconds idle.
- **Mouse support** — all 8 mouse buttons, including side buttons.
- **Live bind list** — see every bind in one panel, remove any with one click.
- **ModMenu config** — everything lives in a clean in-game GUI.

## Install

1. Install **Fabric Loader ≥ 0.19.2** for MC **1.21.11**.
2. Drop into `mods/`:
   - **Fabric API** `0.141.4+1.21.11` or newer
   - **Mod Menu** `17.0.0` or newer
   - `quackys-better-keybinds-1.0.0.jar`

Client-only — no server-side install needed.

## Usage

1. Open **Mod Menu → Quacky's Better Keybinds**.
2. **Search** for the action you want in the search bar.
3. **Click** the action to select it.
4. Click **Set Keys**, then press your combo (one key or many). It locks in after 3s.
5. Toggle **Order** to choose whether press order matters for that combo.
6. Click **Save Bind** — it appears under *Your keybinds* and saves instantly.
7. Remove any bind with the red **X**. Close the screen to persist.

## Compatibility

| | |
|---|---|
| **Minecraft** | 1.21.11 only (API drift means cross-version isn't a single jar) |
| **Loaders** | Fabric. Lunar / Modrinth / Feather work as long as they ship 1.21.11 |
| **Conflicts** | None known — binds drive the game's real KeyMappings, so modded actions work too |

## Known limitations

- Binds never fire while a screen or menu is open, so they can't operate GUIs.
- Actions are read from the game's keybind list — an action with no registered KeyMapping can't be bound.

## License

**MIT.** Quack responsibly.

---

### Other Mods

Make sure to check out my organisation to find other mods! Helps a lot and lets me make more mods — and maybe a common library in the future :)
